EmailTemplate.description: Your Registration as our channel Partner , Not Considered
EmailTemplate.name: CP registration Rejection Email 2
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Registration as our channel Partner , Not Considered
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Broker__c.Name},
We regret to inform you that, we cannot register you as our Channel Partner for the following reason
Reason for Rejection:- "{!ApprovalRequest.Comments}"
In case you wish to re-apply for registration please update & submit the documents as per the reason for rejection.
Click on link for re- apply for registration :-
Portal Onboarding Link
Looking forward to a successful partnership.
Warm Regards,
Runwal Enterprises
